data.title: Microservices
data.technical_spec: Services are broken down into smaller, modular units.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.technical_spec: Encryption protocols such as Signal Protocol.

data.title: Distributed Systems
data.description: System distributed across global servers for scalability.
data.technical_spec: Multiple data centers for load balancing.

data.title: Data Integrity
data.description: Ensures that all messaging data remains consistent and unaltered.
data.technical_spec: Use of checksums and data validation protocols.

data.title: Real-Time Messaging
data.description: Instant message delivery with low latency.
data.technical_spec: Uses a custom protocol optimized for chat applications.
